pitfalls_learned: Drift isNotNull/isNull conflicts with flutter_test matchers - use hide in import
Widget tests with ChangeNotifier streams may timeout - use pump() instead of pumpAndSettle()
Value.absent check: use entry.id.present not entry.id.value == null
withOpacity() deprecated - use withValues(alpha: x)
JOIN queries return JoinedRow - use r.readTable(entity) to extract correct table
Cascade delete requires transaction() for atomicity
Grouped lists need sorted keys for consistent ordering
Check parent list before showing child form dialog - show snackbar if empty
Use null-aware elements [?x] instead of [if (x != null) x] to satisfy use_null_aware_elements lint
Interpolation tests need millisecond precision - use inMilliseconds in both code and test expectations
Self-init provider pattern: call await provider.init() in main() before runApp()
ARB parameterized strings need @key metadata block with placeholders object
fl_chart BarChartGroupData.x requires int - use sequential index, map to month labels in titles
fl_chart has no built-in legend - build custom ChartLegend widget
Multi-meter aggregation: interpolate per-meter independently, then sum - never merge raw readings
FlSpot.nullSpot creates line gaps - guard with .any((s) => s != FlSpot.nullSpot) before rendering
Custom date range + month navigation: navigateMonth() must clear customRange
fl_chart widget tests: can't inspect canvas - focus on data transformation and widget-renders-without-crash
csv package ListToCsvConverter handles quoting/escaping automatically - no manual CSV string building
share_plus needs file on disk - write to getTemporaryDirectory() first, then Share.shareXFiles
Set mimeType on XFile for proper OS handling (e.g., 'text/csv')
Export FAB should be conditional on data availability - hide when no data
context.mounted check required after async operations before showing SnackBar
Year navigation: disable forward arrow at current year with ternary onPressed
Percentage change: guard division by zero when previousYearTotal is 0 or null
12-month x-axis labels crowded on fl_chart - show every-other-month: skip if index % 2 != 0
Extend existing provider for yearly state rather than creating separate provider
Separate provider for pre-aggregated data (smart plugs) — different data flow than interpolated meter data
Other/residual calculation: clamp to max(0, total - tracked), null when no source data
Pie chart percentages: use (tracked + other) as denominator so slices sum to 100%
Grey slice (0xFF9E9E9E) for residual/Other category in pie charts
10-color palette for categorical data, wrap with modulo for > 10 entities
SegmentedButton for period selection (Material 3 standard)
PieChart donut shape: centerSpaceRadius 40, sectionsSpace 2, startDegreeOffset -90
SegmentedButton<ThemeMode> for 3-way theme toggle (Material 3) — wrap value in Set
Dark mode audit: grep Colors.white/black/grey + Color(0x, replace with Theme.of(context).colorScheme or AppColors
Settings TextField: use StatefulWidget with own TextEditingController to avoid cursor loss on provider rebuild
PackageInfo.fromPlatform() is async — wrap in FutureBuilder with loading placeholder
SegmentedButton icons not findable via find.byIcon in widget tests — use find.byType(SegmentedButton<T>) instead
ListView scroll in tests: use tester.drag(find.byType(ListView), Offset(0, -500)) not scrollUntilVisible (multiple Scrollable issue)
Centralize utility colors (otherColor, successColor) in AppColors rather than inline Color() constructors
PriceTier.fromJson: cast via (json['key'] as num?)?.toDouble() — JSON ints aren't doubles in Dart
scrollUntilVisible() for tests where content shifts due to new sections — drag with fixed offset breaks
registerFallbackValue() in setUpAll for custom enum/DateTime types used with any() matcher
CostConfig generated data class lives in app_database.g.dart — import app_database.dart not just tables.dart
DB migration: use m.createTable(newTable) in onUpgrade, not raw SQL — Drift handles column types
Pure service pattern: const constructor, no DB/UI imports, all methods take explicit params — 100% unit testable
Cost is computed not stored: derive from consumption × rate at query time to avoid data sync issues
Glass widgets (buildGlassAppBar, buildGlassFAB, GlassCard) need ThemeProvider in test widget tree — use shared mock helper
buildGlassAppBar has no bottom: param — combine title + subtitle into single title string
DateFormat requires initializeDateFormatting() before first use — call in test setUpAll and app main()
Centralize number formatting in static utility class (ValtraNumberFormat) — screens format, providers return raw values
Chart widgets accept optional locale parameter with 'de' default for backward compat
Bottom nav shortcut bar pattern: push screens via Navigator.push, reset index to 0 on return — avoids nested Scaffolds
Consumer2<ThemeProvider, LocaleProvider> wraps MaterialApp for dual reactive binding
Deferred test fix pattern: when multi-plan phase breaks tests, fix ALL in final integration plan rather than per-plan
DropdownButtonFormField over SegmentedButton for options with long translated text (avoids wrapping)
InputDecorator + InkWell for styled date/time picker fields matching text field aesthetics
Water type semantic colors: blue=cold, red=hot, grey=other (using Colors.* not AppColors)
Feature removal order: screens (UI) first, providers (data) second, ARB (l10n) third, tests last
Shared MockLocaleProvider defaults to 'en' for consistent English-format test assertions
SegmentedButton<String> for binary language toggle (DE/EN) — Material 3 standard pattern
ReadingDisplayItem wrapper model: providers expose displayItems getter with isInterpolated flag; screens render differently based on flag
Toggle state lives in provider (not screen state) — persists across rebuilds, testable independently
Schema migration: defer to final integration plan — change tables.dart early, write migration SQL last for atomicity
CREATE-INSERT-DROP-RENAME for SQLite column removal/rename (no DROP COLUMN support in older versions)
GROUP BY + SUM in migration SQL to merge duplicate entries when consolidating interval types to monthly
Location-to-FK migration: INSERT OR IGNORE DISTINCT values → JOIN back for IDs → COALESCE(null, 'Standard')
Drift DateTime as local epoch seconds: SQLite unixepoch=UTC; compute timezone offset in Dart for migration SQL
Month-based entries: add getEntityForMonth() duplicate check in DAO, return -1 or inline warning on duplicate
Room FK guard: check rooms exist before showing add-meter FAB, display 'create room first' message if empty
Conditional form fields: AnimatedSwitcher or simple if-guard; clear hidden field value when switching away
Apply ratio AFTER interpolation — ratios scale final consumption, not raw meter readings
Extrapolation guard: only current year + monthlyBreakdown.length < 12; past years never extrapolated
Extrapolated bar visual: alpha 0.3 + borderDashArray [6,3] for dashed lighter appearance
QuickEntryMixin: Save&Next keeps dialog open, clears value field, increments counter in title, shows brief SnackBar
ConfirmDeleteDialog.show() static factory — shared widget across all 5 meter screens for consistent UX
Parallel data-layer plans for independent tables (smart plugs vs heating meters) — halves wall-clock time
IndexedStack with bottom nav: _currentTab state, default=1 (Liste), FAB conditional on tab, analytics loads via addPostFrameCallback
Cost toggle pattern: IconButton in app bar, meter-specific icon ↔ euro, hidden when no CostConfig exists
Year comparison chart: use periodStart.month-1 as X-axis position, not array index — calendar-aligned
Smart plug monthly-only analytics: remove yearly code path from provider entirely, keep AnalyticsPeriod enum for compat
Duplicate private widgets per meter screen (_YearNavigationHeader, _YearlySummaryCard) rather than extracting shared — allows independent evolution
Dead code removal: grep for all imports before deleting — last consumer phase owns the deletion
Adding enum value to intEnum: append at end to preserve ordinals — no DB migration needed
Meter screen overhaul replication: copy electricity as template, replace MeterType/Provider/color/unit/icon/CostMeterType — ~30 min per screen
Test provider setup for analytics screens: AnalyticsProvider needs ALL 4 meter DAOs even when testing single meter
